data.body: LAND status: LLM-Review +MAX on all 9; Verified +MAX on 598-605 (4001,44b7,1d1b,1fdc,f476,a263,5977,2da6). 606 (25aa) Verified-1: CI flake in tests/interfaces/io/test_import_batch_resume.py::test_benchmark_commit_count_is_ceil_per_pass ('git commit failed... invalid object... Error building trees' — a git tree-build race in the fast import benchmark). UNRELATED to 25aa delta (compaction-fold/push-policy helpers, mutmut config, docs — nothing touches import/event_append); same test passed on 605's tree and in local full make test. Issuing recheck on 606.
